name: Linear

composio_registry_match.name: Linear
composio_registry_match.description: Linear is a streamlined issue tracking and project planning tool for modern teams, featuring fast workflows, keyboard shortcuts, and GitHub integrations

description: Linear is a streamlined project management tool designed for high-performance software development teams to track issues and sprints.
notes: Linear provides a comprehensive GraphQL API and official TypeScript SDK, making it highly suitable for AI agent integration.
